summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FlowHub admin functionality. Admin role-based access control working correctly with yash.b@mamaearth.in as admin. Admin can manage users and their agent access. Regular users only see agents they have access to. Platform successfully rebranded to FlowHub throughout. Most admin features functional except agent creation endpoint implementation issue.

critical_bugs.issue: FastAPI expects query parameters but function signature suggests form data with file uploads
critical_bugs.impact: Admin cannot create new agents via frontend form

design_issues.issue: React hydration warnings for HTML structure (tr inside span, span inside tbody)

passed_tests: Regular user 403 access denied for admin routes
Agent access filtering for regular users
Admin Panel button appears for admin users
Admin Panel button hidden for regular users
Admin dashboard with stats (14 users, 3 agents, system operational)
Manage Users page with edit access modal and checkboxes
Manage Agents page with create agent modal form
Professional UI design and responsive layout

success_percentage.backend: 90% - Admin APIs working except agent creation endpoint
success_percentage.frontend: 95% - All admin UI features working with minor React warnings

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix admin agent creation endpoint (/api/admin/agents POST) - currently expects query parameters but frontend sends form data with file uploads. Function signature suggests it should accept form data but FastAPI is treating parameters as query params.
